results.name: POST /api/auth/register returns verificationLink + mailSent flag
buyer can invite a teammate via /api/auth/team-user (gets buyer role)
supplier inviting a teammate gets supplierUser role
non-tenant role (no token) is rejected with 401
buyer hits /api/org-directory/me/managed-organizations and gets 200 (was 403)
supplier also gets 200
buyer1 sees audits created by buyer2 in same tenant (regression)
buyer2 also sees audits created by buyer1
supplier sees audits where they are supplier_id
POST /supplier-decision with ACCEPTED writes supplierDecision='ACCEPTED'
supplier1 sees only their own deviation in GET /api/deviations
buyer sees both deviations (no persona scope)
PQ create without supplierId returns 400
PQ create with supplierId succeeds
supplier acknowledges PQ via POST /:id/acknowledge
supplier sees only their own PQ (persona scope)
PQ creation fires both NotificationOutbox and ModuleNotification rows
ModuleNotification row carries actionUrl
POST /api/deviations with supplierId fires DEVIATION_REPORTED to supplier
POST /api/universal/change-controls with changeType=SUPPLIER + no supplierId → 400
POST with supplierId succeeds and creates record
backend accepts ~5mb JSON body without 'PayloadTooLargeError'
CAPA generation writes to BOTH legacy Capa AND new CapaV2
GET /api/workflows/AuditRequest/:id/milestones excludes FOLLOWUP_* by default
auditor PUT with empty responseDetails does NOT wipe supplier's answer
